generated_exposure.exposure_text: Remember when we all had to rush to the shelters during the 2024 crisis? That chaos could've been avoided if we'd invested in better civil defense preparedness. Our neighbors in Europe have had systems like this for years, and they're safer for it. It's not about fear - it's about being practical. We shouldn't have to rely on luck when we could have reliable systems in place. #PreparednessNotParanoia #LearnFromHistory
